fields.description: A list of fields to include in the response. If not provided, all fields will be included.

filter.description: Search query to filter Knowledge Base Entries by specific criteria.

sort_field.description: Field to sort the Knowledge Base Entries by.

sort_order.description: Sort order for the results, either asc or desc.

page.description: Page number for paginated results. Defaults to 1.

per_page.description: Number of Knowledge Base Entries to return per page. Defaults to 20.
